proposed_domain: railway interlocking + absolute block signaling (signals and points coordinated in locked sequence to prevent conflicting train movements; one train per block; route locking enforces mutually-exclusive routes)

closest_prior_match.domain: navigation lock (pressure-equalized handoff with KL<ε gate-open invariant)
closest_prior_match.verdict: CLOSE — both are infrastructure-level locks but navigation-lock is fluid-pressure handoff between two basins; railway-interlocking is track/signal coordination preventing conflicting movements. Different mechanism class.

decision: ACCEPT-WITH-CAVEAT — lock-overlap with R208 noted; mechanism class differs.
